news.summary: Ethisphere awarded AtkinsRéalis Compliance Leader Verification for 2025, 2026, and 2027, recognizing world-class ethics and compliance commitment

briefing_memo: AtkinsRealis has received $1,560,000 in federal funding to date. A class action lawsuit was filed in January 2025 against AtkinsRealis and two former executives over alleged disclosure failures (marketwatch.com, January 2025). The company completed a remediation agreement for historic offenses (1997–2004), had World Bank sanctions lifted early in 2021, completed probation monitorship, and received Ethisphere's 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies recognition (finance.yahoo.com, March 2026) and Compliance Leader Verification through 2027. Given the material remediation, third-party integrity certifications, and the single medium-severity allegation relating to disclosure rather than corruption, standard due diligence with contract-specific integrity review is recommended.

actions.title: No adverse action required at this time
actions.rationale: Organization shows low risk profile (score 4/100) with no sanctions hits, no court cases, no critical or high-severity news, and documented integrity transformation including third-party ethics verification
